title.en: Establish and Maintain a Data Classification Scheme

prose.en: Establish and maintain an overall data classification scheme for the enterprise. Enterprises may use labels, such as "Sensitive," "Confidential," and "Public," and classify their data according to those labels. Review and update the classification scheme annually, or when significant enterprise changes occur that could impact this Safeguard.
An overall data classification scheme is established and maintained for the enterprise.
Enterprises use labels, such as "Sensitive," "Confidential," and "Public," and classify their data according to those labels.
The classification scheme is reviewed and updated annually, or when significant enterprise changes occur that could impact this Safeguard.
